headline: Class coverage expansion probe achieved val ROC-AUC 0.665 and requests submission.
focus: Submission bundle packaging for class-coverage-expansion-probe pipeline
root_cause: The notebook-derived Bayesian prior + embedding probe pipeline is live with expanded class coverage (52→75 active classes, 708 cache rows). The probe head recovered signal from 23 previously uncovered classes, but the gap between train soundscape ROC-AUC (0.992) and validation soundscape ROC-AUC (0.665) indicates overfitting or domain shift. Prior fusion validation metric (0.662) closely tracks the primary metric, suggesting the Bayesian prior adds marginal improvement at this stage. The padded_cmap remains very low (0.062), pointing to weak segment-level localization. Next steps are submission bundle parity and calibration.
